pi_items.source: task.json - synthetic test data for job applicant

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a job application in Odoo HR for a fictional candidate named Maria Chen (email: maria.chen@techmail.com, phone: 555-0142) applying for the position 'Experienced Developer' in the 'Research & Development' department with an expected salary of 75,000 USD. The job position and department are real Odoo demo objects. All metadata values are verified as correct and reasonable.
